name: Animal Kingdom
description: Questions about animals, habitats and biology — a fun challenge for teens.

stations.title: Fastest
stations.questionText: Which land animal is the fastest runner in the world?

stations.title: Tallest
stations.questionText: What is the tallest animal on Earth?

stations.title: Ocean giant
stations.questionText: What is the largest animal that has ever lived?

stations.title: No bones
stations.questionText: What do we call animals without a backbone, like insects and jellyfish?

stations.title: Change form
stations.questionText: What is the process called when a caterpillar becomes a butterfly?

stations.title: Night hunter
stations.questionText: Which bird can rotate its head almost all the way around and hunts at night?

stations.title: Group name
stations.questionText: What do we call a group of lions living together?

stations.title: Cold blood
stations.questionText: Reptiles like snakes and lizards are warm-blooded or cold-blooded?

stations.title: Big heart
stations.questionText: How many legs does a spider have?

stations.title: Long sleep
stations.questionText: What do we call the deep winter sleep of bears?
